contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Hotfix: revert oracle CDN integration (package global API mismatch broke signing); root-caused + handed proper fix to Sophia
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/43
  
  Details:
  Spun up the oracle locally with Sophia's CDN integration (PR #42) for review and caught a prod-breaking runtime bug: 'DaoClient.base64ToArrayBuffer is not a function' on every signing op (identity link/verify + reading submission). Root-caused from the minified bundle: @truesight_dao/dao-client@1.0.0 is built with esbuild --global-name=DaoClient on 'export class DaoClient', so window.DaoClient is the module NAMESPACE ({DaoClient: class}) not the class — the static base64 helpers live at DaoClient.DaoClient.*, while the oracle (and the package README) call DaoClient.* directly. node --check passed because it's a runtime API-shape mismatch, not a syntax error. Reverted PR #42 (oracle #43): restored the known-good inline base64 helpers in index.html + oracle-draw-submit.js and removed the CDN tag, parse-verified, merged → prod signing restored. Handed the proper fix to Sophia in topic 1638: fix the browser build so the global IS the class, add a runtime smoke test that loads the actual bundle and asserts the global shape (node --check cannot catch this class of bug), bump+republish 1.0.1, re-integrate the oracle pinned to @1.0.1 — open the PR for local review rather than auto-merging (integration has broken prod twice). All commits carry the Generated-by attribution trailer.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------
